# Nevada Assisted Living
> 2026 Independent Resource Guide for Nevada families navigating senior care and financial aid.

## Core Resources
- [Home](https://nevadaassistedliving.org/): 2026 senior living financial guide, tax deduction, Medicaid limits, memory care standards.
- [Henderson Guide](https://nevadaassistedliving.org/henderson-assisted-living.html): 2026 cost breakdown and neighborhood reviews for Henderson, NV.
- [Financial Aid](https://nevadaassistedliving.org/financial-aid.html): Medicaid waiver, Veteran's Aid, and "One Big Beautiful Bill" tax deduction.
- [Memory Care](https://nevadaassistedliving.org/memory-care.html): Safety standards and staffing ratios for Alzheimer's and dementia facilities.
- [Locations](https://nevadaassistedliving.org/locations.html): Las Vegas vs. Reno comparison for senior care.
- [LTC Insurance](https://nevadaassistedliving.org/long-term-care-insurance.html): Long-term care insurance and elimination period in Nevada.
- [Cost Checklist](https://nevadaassistedliving.org/cost-checklist.html): 2026 cost ranges and financial aid quick reference; printable.
- [Disclosure](https://nevadaassistedliving.org/disclosure.html): How the site is funded and referral partnerships.
- [Privacy](https://nevadaassistedliving.org/privacy.html): Privacy policy and data handling.

## Audience
Families of seniors in Clark and Washoe counties seeking independent, up-to-date care and financing information.
